test_type: Frontend QA - CR-016 Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle
summary: QA re-test for CR-016 Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle. All 7 test cases passed. The hierarchy toggle is correctly visible for Central Store (TOP/master) and Master Store (MID/central) users, and correctly hidden for Outlet (BOTTOM/franchise) users. Toggle ON shows 4th KPI 'Stores in Scope', low-stock alert banner, and Store Heatmap grid. Toggle OFF removes hierarchy elements while preserving own-store inventory table. CR-029 tabs (All/FG/Raw) work correctly with hierarchy toggle.

tests.feature: Central Store - Hierarchy Toggle Visible, Default OFF
tests.details: Logged in as Central Store (manager@germanfluid.com). Hierarchy toggle (data-testid='hierarchy-toggle') is visible. Default state is OFF (data-state='unchecked'). Label shows 'My store'. 4th KPI and heatmap NOT visible when OFF.

tests.feature: Central Store - Toggle ON Shows Hierarchy Elements
tests.details: Toggle ON: (a) Label changed to 'All stores', (b) 4th KPI 'Stores in Scope' appeared showing '7', (c) Low-stock alert banner appeared: '52 low stock items across 7 stores', (d) Store Heatmap grid appeared with 7 StoreHeatmapCard components.

tests.feature: Central Store - Toggle OFF Removes Hierarchy Elements
tests.details: Toggle OFF: Label changed back to 'My store'. 4th KPI removed. Store heatmap removed. Own-store inventory table still present.
Logged in as Master Store (manager@centralkitchenalpha.com). Hierarchy toggle is visible. User level shows 'Master Store — Store #807'.
Logged in as Outlet (manager@outletdirectone.com). Hierarchy toggle container and switch are NOT visible (as expected). User level shows 'Outlet — Store #809'. Own-store inventory table is visible.

Heatmap cards show: (a) Store name (e.g., 'Central Kitchen Beta'), (b) Type label correctly mapped via terminology (master→Central Store, central→Master Store, franchise→Outlet), (c) Low-stock/total ratio badge (e.g., '11/11'), (d) Progress bar. Cards sorted worst-first.

tests.feature: CR-029 Tabs Work With Hierarchy Toggle
tests.details: With hierarchy toggle ON: FG tab shows 4 rows, Raw tab shows 43 rows, All tab shows 47 rows. 4th KPI and heatmap remain visible after tab switching. Tabs filter own-store inventory table independent of hierarchy.

critical_code_review_comments: StockInventorySummary.jsx: canToggleHierarchy correctly gates toggle visibility based on isTopLevel || isMiddleLevel
useStockInventory.js: showHierarchy state correctly triggers API call with ?include_hierarchy=true
StoreHeatmapCard: Correctly uses mapRestaurantType() for terminology mapping (master→Central Store, central→Master Store, franchise→Outlet)
Heatmap cards correctly sorted worst-first by low_stock_rows/stock_rows ratio
CR-029 tabs (stockType state) work independently of hierarchy toggle
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-016 Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle fully verified. Toggle visible for Central Store (TOP) and Master Store (MID), hidden for Outlet (BOTTOM). When ON: 4th KPI shows store count, alert banner shows low-stock summary, heatmap shows 7 stores with health cards sorted worst-first. Terminology mapping working correctly. CR-029 tabs work independently of hierarchy toggle.
